_description: A fact equally at home in personal/career and work/pipeline → status ambiguous

candidate.content: Decided to pursue AI/ML contracting as primary income track for summer 2026
candidate.evidence: I'm going all-in on contracting this summer

expected_output.ambiguity_note: Could fit a personal goals page (career direction, durable) or an active-work goals page. The configured page catalog does not settle the destination.

routing_rationale: When a goal straddles personal identity ('who I am') and active operational work ('what I'm doing this cycle'), the router cannot resolve without an explicit disambiguation rule. This case should be flagged and the rule added to ROUTING.md.
